ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To May-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Continued To May-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Continued To Apr-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rodel Rodis for Deonne Madamba.

Mr. Rodis stated that his client had just brought him all of the final documents and that he could have an amended account on file in two weeks. The Court set the hearing date for the amended first and final account for April 12, 2011. The amended account is to be on file by the close of business on March 22, 2011 and is to be served with 15 days notice. If the amended account is not on file by the close of business on March 22, 2011 then sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day are imposed and shall run until the amended account is on file.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Continued To Mar-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rodel Rodis for Executrix.

Mr. Rodis requested a continuance to file an amended petition. The matter was continued to March 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Continued To Feb-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Errol Zshornack, Esq. for Petitioner Deonne Madamba.

The Court inquired of the status on number of issues outlined by the examiner and received a call from someone, tried to call back but didn't make contact. Mr. Zshornack reported that the estate continue to receive property tax assessment(s) and would like to pay off these taxes first, he was told that there are two more assessments coming this month of December and by January he should be in a position to make a final distribution and will know the exact amount left in the estate, and requested for a continuance for a period of at
Least 60 days. The Court granted the request; the petition for final distribution is continued to February 8, 2011

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Continued To Dec-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Continued To Oct-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1563 Van Dyke St., San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rodel Rodis for and with Deonne Madamba (Petitioner/Executrix).

The sale was confirmed at $450,000.00. The Court granted the petition (subject to the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Waiver Of Appraisal By Probate Referee
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Rodel Rodis appearing for the Executrix.
Mr. Rodis was informed that it is court policy to appoint a Probate Referee, that no appraisal has been done as of the date of death, and that the property was sold for less than the appraised value. Therefore, the court denied the petition. Counsel asked the Court to reconsider it's ruling stating that it was the wish of the decedemt to have family members receive the funds. His request was denied. The Court directed Mr. Rodis to get a probate referee appointed forthwith.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: O. Arias. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition For Waiver Of Appraisal By Probate Referee
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Continued To Oct-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 10/3. Clerk to contact counsel
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Kurt Sandberg.
